review_decision.decision: Expose typed Consultant MCP tools backed by a shared deliberation engine.
review_decision.context: Agents need high-quality design review without leaking secrets or spending unbounded budget.

research.question: What are best practices for MCP tool design with typed outputs?
research.context: Building a beta consultant MCP package for autonomous agents.

challenge_answer.task: Recommend whether to use Rust or TypeScript for the MCP server core.
challenge_answer.proposedAnswer: Use TypeScript for speed of iteration in beta.
challenge_answer.context: Team is migrating consultant-mcp to Rust-first with parity proofs.

compare_options.problem: Choose the default MCP transport for consultant-mcp beta.

options.name: stdio-rust
options.description: Rust rmcp stdio transport launched from npm bin.

compare_options.context: Agents need reliable consultant tools with minimal ops overhead.
